Verified against task.json instructions specifying <= 80% for A and <= 95% for B.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated inventory spreadsheet located at /home/ga/Documents/inventory_abc_analysis.xlsx, initially populated with 250 SKU items on the Inventory sheet. The agent is required to compute Annual_Value, sort descending, compute Cumulative_Value, Cumulative_Pct, and then classify items into ABC classes based on 80% and 95% thresholds. A new Summary sheet must also be generated with COUNTIF calculations.
